example_label: Calculate volume and lateral surface of a cylindrical column with 2.5m radius and 12.8m height
result_context: The volumen ({volumen}) is the capacity of the cylinder; area_lateral ({area_lateral}) is the curved surface área excluding top and bottom bases.
formula_display: Volume = Ïâ‚¬ × r² × h | Lateral Área = 2 × Ïâ‚¬ × r × h

steps.description: Results: 251.33 cubic units volume, 201.06 square units lateral area

mistakes: Using diameter instead of radius in fórmulas
